review_scope: Primary Batches 1-6 plus Reinforced Batches 1-2 of 3
escalation_rule: POTENTIALLY_SYSTEMIC at three or more independent core clusters, at two or more domains with HIGH severity, or on recurrence across dataset types; SYSTEMIC_BLOCKER only with evidence of significant unreviewed-dataset impact or class-level ground-truth unreliability.

accepted_evidence: Clusters 004 and 020 declare contradiction handling without an explicit incompatible claim pair.
rejected_hypotheses: The defect does not apply merely because a fixture contains a gap or an uncertain assumption.

accepted_evidence: Clusters 028 and 032 request contradiction reconciliation without an explicit incompatible claim pair.
rejected_hypotheses: Complete clusters 001 and 017 demonstrate that ordinary uncertainty and tradeoffs do not require contradiction handling.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Canonical-core contradictory-state oracle template; repeated linkage is evidenced, while the exact authoring generator remains unproven.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: Clusters 016 and 036 declare contradiction handling without an explicit incompatible claim pair.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-007-ES, S9-CORE-007-EN, S9-CORE-007-RU, S9-CORE-007-ZH, S9-CORE-022-ES, S9-CORE-022-EN, S9-CORE-022-RU, S9-CORE-022-ZH

accepted_evidence: Prior unsupported high-risk occurrences remain valid.
rejected_hypotheses: Cluster 039 does not repeat the defect: its injury, coverage, qualified-review, privacy, and withholding expectations are source-grounded.

accepted_evidence: No Batch 5 fixture asserts unsupported high-risk ground truth.
rejected_hypotheses: Personal classification and care context remain bounded to scope rejection and data minimization rather than being promoted to unsupported high-risk status.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: High-risk expectation mappings across multiple core domains; no single shared generator is established.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: The selected high-risk contexts are genuinely safety-sensitive; the defects concern clarification and recommendation scope rather than unsupported high-risk classification.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-036-ES, S9-CORE-036-EN, S9-CORE-036-RU, S9-CORE-037-ES, S9-CORE-037-RU, S9-CORE-037-ZH

accepted_evidence: The prior unsupported nonexistent-option occurrence remains valid.
rejected_hypotheses: Batch 4 authority-rejection fixtures expose their offending imperative directly and do not depend on an invisible nonexistent option.

accepted_evidence: EVAL-006 expects an unknown-field rejection without exposing any candidate or unknown field in its source.
rejected_hypotheses: EVAL-019 and EVAL-032 expose their offending consent directive and personal classification directly.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Synthetic-risk negative-fixture oracle construction; recurrence is bounded and no class-wide template defect is proven.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Review manifest projection omits mutated candidate fields required to verify negative schema oracles.

confirmed_evidence: Three schema rejection oracles depend on mutated fields absent from the versioned review source.

accepted_evidence: The prior unsafe clarification or refusal findings remain valid.
rejected_hypotheses: Cluster 039 provides a grounded high-risk clarification and withholding counterexample without professional certainty.

accepted_evidence: Clusters 028 and 032 trigger contradiction reconciliation from gaps rather than incompatible claims.
rejected_hypotheses: Clusters 006 and 011 ask a focused material-gap question, and MATERIAL-024 fails closed on a visible version defect.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Clarification and failure-status mapping for core incomplete or contradictory templates.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: Contradiction clarification is unsupported in 016/036 and no-action semantics remain disputed in 037.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-007-ES, S9-CORE-007-EN, S9-CORE-007-RU, S9-CORE-007-ZH, S9-CORE-022-ES, S9-CORE-022-EN, S9-CORE-022-RU, S9-CORE-022-ZH, S9-CORE-030-ES, S9-CORE-030-EN, S9-CORE-030-RU, S9-CORE-030-ZH

accepted_evidence: The Spanish tenant is explicitly female while the cluster's other referents are neutral or masculine-form.
rejected_hypotheses: No material gender or referent drift was found in the other six selected clusters.

accepted_evidence: Clusters 001, 006, and 011 differ between feminine Spanish, masculine-form Russian, and neutral EN/ZH referents.
rejected_hypotheses: The other four selected clusters preserve referent identity without material gender drift.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Locale-specific translation or fixture-authoring templates; shared generator responsibility is plausible but unproven.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Locale-specific fixture authoring without an enforced cross-locale referent convention.

confirmed_evidence: Cluster 007 adds feminine Spanish and masculine-form Russian referents while EN/ZH remain neutral.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-016-ES, S9-CORE-016-EN, S9-CORE-016-RU, S9-CORE-016-ZH, S9-CORE-022-ES, S9-CORE-022-EN, S9-CORE-022-RU, S9-CORE-022-ZH, S9-CORE-030-ES, S9-CORE-030-EN, S9-CORE-030-RU, S9-CORE-030-ZH

accepted_evidence: The prior privacy-expectation disagreement remains recorded.
rejected_hypotheses: Cluster 039 consistently requires data minimization, no identifiers, and broad-category handling across all four languages.

accepted_evidence: No new privacy expectation disagreement is established.
rejected_hypotheses: The consent-policy imperative is rejected, personal classification fails synthetic scope, and caregiving variants consistently require data minimization.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Rich-material privacy handling and minimization expectations; currently isolated to one prior fixture.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: No new privacy disagreement appears; data minimization and non-identifying handling remain coherent.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-033-ES, S9-CORE-033-EN, S9-CORE-033-ZH, S9-CORE-036-ES, S9-CORE-036-EN, S9-CORE-036-RU, S9-MATERIAL-020

accepted_evidence: The prior controlled-failure disagreement remains recorded.
rejected_hypotheses: Eight Batch 4 controlled-failure fixtures expose coherent fail-closed triggers and machine-readable reasons.

accepted_evidence: No new controlled-failure disagreement is established.
rejected_hypotheses: Visible safety, scope, version, and material-gap triggers produce coherent rejection, failure, or clarification behavior.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Rich-material controlled-failure reason mapping; currently isolated to one prior fixture.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Review manifest projection omits mutated candidate fields required to verify negative schema oracles.

confirmed_evidence: Three controlled schema failures have invisible triggers, while visible invalid-category, safety, and evidence failures remain coherent.

accepted_evidence: EVAL-003 strengthens initial investment into recurrent fixed cost and limited capacity into outage.
rejected_hypotheses: Relocation, overlap, withdrawal, and consequence-horizon risks in the listed counterexamples remain bounded by visible source commitments.

accepted_evidence: Cluster 019 invents simultaneous double housing cost, and EVAL-027 strengthens bounded facts into recurrence and outage mechanisms.
rejected_hypotheses: Decision deadlines, contract timing, and lease exit concerns in the listed counterexamples remain tied to explicit source facts or gaps.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Source-to-reference risk-mechanism authoring across core and synthetic-risk datasets.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: Cluster 007 invents debt exposure and all seven risk fixtures contain mechanisms stronger than the source, though three also have higher-severity invisible-oracle defects.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-022-ES, S9-CORE-022-EN, S9-CORE-022-RU, S9-CORE-022-ZH, S9-CORE-030-ES, S9-CORE-030-EN, S9-CORE-030-RU, S9-CORE-030-ZH

patterns.pattern: reference behavior not supported by input

accepted_evidence: Nine Batch 4 fixtures contain reference behavior stronger than their visible input.
rejected_hypotheses: Twenty-seven Batch 4 fixtures provide counterexamples with coherent, source-supported reference behavior.

accepted_evidence: Fourteen Batch 5 fixtures contain reference behavior stronger than or invisible in their source.
rejected_hypotheses: Twenty-two Batch 5 fixtures provide source-supported decision, safety, preservation, or failure behavior.

patterns.generator_or_template_linkage: Umbrella source-to-reference authoring across core, synthetic-risk, and rich-material families; not attributable to one generator.
patterns.likely_root_cause: Source-to-reference authoring permits expectations stronger than explicit source entailment.

confirmed_evidence: Twenty-one Batch 6 fixtures contain unsupported or disputed reference behavior; fifteen are source-supported counterexamples.
counterevidence: Counterexamples: S9-CORE-022-ES, S9-CORE-022-EN, S9-CORE-022-RU, S9-CORE-022-ZH, S9-CORE-030-ES, S9-CORE-030-EN, S9-CORE-030-RU, S9-CORE-030-ZH, S9-CORE-029-EN, S9-CORE-029-RU, S9-CORE-029-ZH, S9-CORE-033-ES, S9-CORE-033-EN, S9-CORE-033-ZH, S9-MATERIAL-020

blocker_assessment: All 216 fixtures have primary review. Recurring source-entailment and oracle-visibility defects require reinforced adjudication and future remediation design, but bounded counterexamples prevent a class-wide unusability finding.
